notes: Real GRPO of Qwen/Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct on 1xA10G via HF Jobs. 30 GRPO steps with composed reward functions against the live HF Space env. Delta is approximately zero because num_generations=2 + temperature=1.0 + a 0.5B-param model produced near-identical outputs in each generation group, so GRPO advantage was 0 and gradients ~0 most steps. The pipeline ran end-to-end. Following this, an SFT run was launched via scripts/hf_job_sft.py to actually move the reward.
